response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff Software Engineer with strong polyglot and open-source experience, but he completely lacks the executive leadership background required for a CTO role. He does not have a track record of scaling engineering organizations, managing external delivery partners, or operating high-stakes algorithmic fintech systems. Furthermore, his exposure to agentic AI appears too recent and IC-focused to meet the deep architectural and production requirements of this position.
strengths: Deep backend and distributed systems expertise, including event-driven architectures and microservices.
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship, observability, and rigorous testing methodologies (TDD, CI/CD).
Polyglot engineering background with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
concerns: Zero executive leadership experience or track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Lacks production experience architecting complex, multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes financial environments.
No demonstrated experience in deep fintech infrastructure such as algorithmic working-capital allocation or real-time credit risk.
